intended_use: The system is intended to be used for head, whole body Computed Tomography applications.
intended_use_full: The system is intended to be used for head, whole body Computed Tomography applications.
ground_truth: IEC standard phantoms (QA and ACR phantoms) used for image quality and dose evaluation under standard and challenging conditions
other_metrics: Non-clinical bench test results demonstrated the subject device performs equivalently to the predicate device per IEC 61223-3-5 ed 2 performance testing standards; compliance with IEC 60601-1 Ed. 3.1, NEMA XR25, XR26, XR28, and 21 CFR Subchapter J.
